sections.paragraph:
f. עֲנִיָּה plur. עֲנִיִּים, עֲנִיִּיִ adj.-

(1) afflicted, wretched, poor, often with the added idea of piety, Exo 22:24 Deu 24:12 Psa 10:2, Psa 10:9 14:6 18:28 .

(2) meek, mild, comp. עָנָי No. 2, Zec 9:9.

Plur. עֲנִיִּים is often in קרי, where כתיב has עֲנָוִים Psa 9:19 Isa 32:7.
